scripts.test:e2e-followup: ANALYTICS_ENABLE_TEST_HOOKS=1 EXPLORER_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano ANALYTICS_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano node ../../packages/cli/bin/flue.mjs run waiter --target node --id e2e_followup --env .env --env .env.secrets --payload '{"message":"force followup smoke test","sessionName":"e2e_followup","streamName":"main","source":"cli","waiterModel":"anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5","kitchenModel":"openai/gpt-5.4-nano","testFollowupQuestion":"Which dashboard should I update?"}'
scripts.test:e2e-pass-through: ANALYTICS_ENABLE_TEST_HOOKS=1 EXPLORER_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano ANALYTICS_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano node ../../packages/cli/bin/flue.mjs run waiter --target node --id e2e_pass_through --env .env --env .env.secrets --payload '{"message":"show the same result by week","sessionName":"e2e_pass_through","streamName":"main","activeRoute":"analytics","source":"cli","waiterModel":"anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5","kitchenModel":"openai/gpt-5.4-nano","testScenario":"pass_through"}'
scripts.test:e2e-preflight-blocker: ANALYTICS_ENABLE_TEST_HOOKS=1 EXPLORER_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano ANALYTICS_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano node ../../packages/cli/bin/flue.mjs run waiter --target node --id e2e_preflight_blocker --env .env --env .env.secrets --payload '{"message":"validate the dashboard SQL","sessionName":"e2e_preflight_blocker","streamName":"main","source":"cli","waiterModel":"anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5","kitchenModel":"openai/gpt-5.4-nano","testScenario":"preflight_blocker"}'
scripts.test:e2e-postflight-followup: ANALYTICS_ENABLE_TEST_HOOKS=1 EXPLORER_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano ANALYTICS_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano node ../../packages/cli/bin/flue.mjs run waiter --target node --id e2e_postflight_followup --env .env --env .env.secrets --payload '{"message":"make the report","sessionName":"e2e_postflight_followup","streamName":"main","source":"cli","waiterModel":"anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5","kitchenModel":"openai/gpt-5.4-nano","testScenario":"postflight_followup"}'
scripts.test:e2e-revise-block: ANALYTICS_ENABLE_TEST_HOOKS=1 EXPLORER_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano ANALYTICS_MODEL=openai/gpt-5.4-nano node ../../packages/cli/bin/flue.mjs run waiter --target node --id e2e_revise_block --env .env --env .env.secrets --payload '{"message":"try again and create the ticket","sessionName":"e2e_revise_block","streamName":"main","turnType":"rework","source":"cli","waiterModel":"anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5","kitchenModel":"openai/gpt-5.4-nano","testScenario":"revise_then_block"}'
